---
title: "Rubins Data Reference"
output: html_notebook
---
This is based on work by David Diasbato, [originally published in 2021 on his blog](http://www.daviddisabato.com/blog/2021/2/13/analyzing-and-pooling-
        results-from-multiply-imputed-data).
I used his original code to test imputation across packages and modified it to 
create a python test data set for imputation with known variables.

Please refer to the original coode for more information and an actual description
of the steps.

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mice))
library(str2str)
set.seed(01042021) # set seed so the imputed data are the same every time
ampute_obj <- ampute(data = attitude, prop = .50, bycases = TRUE)
attitude_na <- ampute_obj[["amp"]]
print(attitude_na)
```

```{r}
mice_obj <- mice(attitude_na, m = 5, method = "norm", printFlag = FALSE)
mice_fit <- with(mice_obj, lm(rating ~ complaints + privileges + learning + raises + critical + advance))
```
And then we'll pool the MICE fit
```{r}
pool.fit <- pool(mice_fit)
summary(pool.fit)
```

```{r}
attitude_imp <- complete(mice_obj, action = "all", include = FALSE)
```

```{r}
for(i in 1:5){
  write.csv(
    attitude_imp[[i]],
    paste('~/Desktop/mice_test/impute_', i, '.csv', sep=''))
}
```

```{r}
frm <- 'rating ~ complaints + privileges + learning + raises + critical + advance'
```

And then we fit each regression

```{r}
lm_imp <- lapply(X = attitude_imp, FUN = function(dat) lm(frm, data = dat))
```

```{r}
lapply(X = lm_imp[1:3], FUN = summary) 
```

```{r}
coef_imp <- lapply(X = lm_imp, FUN = coef)
coef_imp
```
```{r}
vcov_imp <- lapply(X = lm_imp, FUN = vcov) 
```
```{r}
for(i in 1:5){
  write.csv(vcov_imp[[i]],
            paste('~/Desktop/mice_test/vcov_', i, '.csv', sep=''))
}
```

```{r}
coef_mat <- lv2m(coef_imp, along = 1)
print(coef_mat[1:3, ])
```

```{r}
vcov_ary <- lm2a(vcov_imp)
print(vcov_ary[,, 1:3])
```

```{r}
coef_pool <- colMeans(coef_mat)
print(coef_pool)
```

```{r}
cov.w <- apply(X = vcov_ary, MARGIN = c(1,2), FUN = mean)
cov.w
```


```{r}
coef_dev <- coef_mat - matrix(coef_pool, byrow = TRUE, nrow = nrow(coef_mat),
ncol = ncol(coef_mat))
coef_dev2 <- t(coef_dev) %*% coef_dev
dimnames(coef_dev2) <- dimnames(cov.w)
m <- nlay(vcov_ary)
missing_data <- coef_dev2 / (m - 1)
print(missing_data)
```
```{r}
finite_simulation <- missing_data / m
print(finite_simulation)
```

```{r}
total_error <- cov.w + missing_data + finite_simulation
print(total_error)
```

```{r}
fmi <- (diag(missing_data) + diag(finite_simulation)) / diag(total_error)
print(fmi)
```

```{r}
df_com <- df.residual(lm_imp[[1]])
v <- (m - 1) / fmi^2
vhat <- (1 - fmi) * ((df_com + 1) / (df_com + 3)) * df_com
df_imp <- (v^(-1) + vhat^(-1))^(-1)
print(df_imp)
```
